title: sterculia cauliflora
intro: Sterculia cauliflora, also known as the Java cocoa tree, is a tropical plant species native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Sterculia cauliflora include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making a tea by infusing the leaves or roots in hot water, or using the plant's extracts in capsule or tincture form.
